sentences.translation: Majka je kuhala pirinač s piletinom za ručak.
sentences.translationEn: The mother cooked rice with chicken for lunch.

sentences.arabic: أَضَافَتِ الزَّعْفَرَانَ فَأَصْبَحَ الرُّزُّ أَصْفَرَ وَجَمِيلًا.
sentences.translation: Dodala je šafran i pirinač je postao žut i lijep.
sentences.translationEn: She added saffron and the rice became yellow and beautiful.

sentences.arabic: وَضَعَتِ الطَّبَقَ عَلَى الطَّاوِلَةِ وَنَادَتِ الْعَائِلَةَ.
sentences.translation: Stavila je tanjir na sto i pozvala porodicu.
sentences.translationEn: She placed the dish on the table and called the family.

sentences.translation: Svi su jeli i hvalili hranu.
sentences.translationEn: Everyone ate and praised the food.
